nasb.text: The Lord will sustain him upon his sickbed; In his illness, You restore him to health.

esv.text: The Lord sustains him on his sickbed; in his illness you restore him to full health.

cnv.text: 他患病在床，耶和華必扶持他； 在病榻中你使他恢復健康。

ccb.text: 他们生病在床， 耶和华必看顾， 使他们康复。

csbs.text: 他在病床上，耶和华会扶持他； 耶和华啊，他伤病时，你使他在病榻上痊愈。
